parameters.name: op
parameters.label: Reference Operator
parameters.description: This node is used to specify the time settings referenced by the Beat . The time is defined by the Time found at

parameters.name: reftimeslice
parameters.label: Use Reference Time Slice
parameters.description: Turn on this checkbox to use the used by the .

parameters.name: playmode
parameters.label: Play Mode
parameters.description: Specifies the method used to playback the output.

parameters.name: period
parameters.label: Period
parameters.description: Number of beats it takes to generate one cycle of ramp.	Use the drop down menu to select from some commonly used Period lengths.

parameters.name: multiples
parameters.label: Multiples
parameters.description: The number of channels to create.

parameters.name: shiftoffset
parameters.label: Shift Offset
parameters.description: Delays all channels by this amount. 0 = no change, .5 means 50% of one period later.

parameters.name: shiftstep
parameters.label: Shift Step
parameters.description: When set to 1, and Multiples is 5, each ramp channel is 1/5 cycle later than the previous channel. When set to .1, the delay is 1/50 cycle. This is a way to stagger the channels.

parameters.name: randoffset
parameters.label: Random Offset
parameters.description: The amount that each ramp is randomly time-shifted relative to a perfect ramp.

parameters.name: randseed
parameters.label: Random Seed
parameters.description: Changing this generates a different set of random offsets.

parameters.name: resetcondition
parameters.label: Reset Condition
parameters.description: This menu determines how the Reset input triggers a reset of the channel(s).

parameters.name: resetbarvalue
parameters.label: Reset Bar Value
parameters.description: Specifies which Bar the Beat will jump to when the Reset Condition is met. Beat values are derived from the fractional part of this value.

parameters.name: resetwait
parameters.label: Wait after Reset
parameters.description: When using the Reset Condition, Wait After Reset will hold the channels at zero until the next bar is started, after which the output will continue. When Wait After Reset is off, the channels will res

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: This button resets the ramps to zero when On. The ramp is also zero when the Beat 's input is above 0.

parameters.name: resetpulse
parameters.label: Reset Pulse
parameters.description: Instantly resets the ramps to zero.

parameters.name: updateglobal
parameters.label: Update Global
parameters.description: Any Beat can be made the "global beat source" by turning on Update Global. A reference Beat is created at /local/master_beat (if it doesn't already exist) and all Beat CHOPs can synchronize to this by

parameters.name: ramp
parameters.label: Ramp
parameters.description: Outputs a 0-1 ramp each period.

parameters.name: pulse
parameters.label: Pulse
parameters.description: Outputs a pulse each period.

parameters.name: sine
parameters.label: Sine
parameters.description: Outputs a sine wave each period.

parameters.name: count
parameters.label: Count
parameters.description: Increases the count each period.

parameters.name: countramp
parameters.label: Count+Ramp
parameters.description: A ramp that counts up until the bar is reset.

parameters.name: bar
parameters.label: Bar
parameters.description: Output the current bar.

parameters.name: beat
parameters.label: Beat
parameters.description: Output the current beat.

parameters.name: sixteenths
parameters.label: Sixteenths
parameters.description: Output the current sixteenths.

parameters.name: rampbar
parameters.label: Ramp Bar
parameters.description: Outputs a 0-1 ramp each bar.

parameters.name: rampbeat
parameters.label: Ramp Beat
parameters.description: Outputs a 0-1 ramp each beat.

parameters.name: bpm
parameters.label: BPM
parameters.description: Outputs the current BPM.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

examples.label: Configure Time Slice and Play Mode
examples.code:
n = op('beat1')
n.par.timeslice = True
n.par.playmode = 'locked'
n.par.ramp = False
examples.description: Common settings from 10 real Derivative examples
